news.headline: Vast astronaut mission kicks off commercial race to replace ISS
news.summary:
<p>The race to replace the ageing International Space Station (ISS) is heating up after US company Vast announced a mission to fly an astronaut to its planned Haven-1 station next year.</p>

news.headline: Can Abelardo De La Espriella, a U.S. Citizen, Become Colombia’s President?
news.summary: President Trump this week endorsed the right-wing candidate, Abelardo De La Espriella, a dual citizen of Colombia and the United States, in Colombia’s presidential runoff.
